name: TenantProvisioningOrchestrator

ironRules.rule: SETNX at ORDER 1 before any write. Concurrent provisioning requests for the same tenantId MUST be rejected via lock — not allowed to produce duplicate tenant records.
bulkSeed MUST be synchronous. async scatter (Promise.all/allSettled on seed operations) is prohibited — partial completion on crash leaves tenant in half-initialized state.
tenantId MUST be resolved from AsyncLocalStorage only — NEVER from request payload. Accepting tenantId as a parameter enables tenant impersonation.
TenantProvisioningFailed MUST be emitted on any error at any step before returning DataProcessResult.failure. Downstream consumers depend on this event for compensating actions.
DNA-8: storeDocument(tenantRecord) MUST occur before enqueue(TenantProvisioned). Record must exist before downstream processors receive the event.

keywords: tenant provisioning orchestrator SETNX idempotency bulkSeed synchronous TenantProvisioned TenantProvisioningFailed AsyncLocalStorage ALS atomic bootstrap
